chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail No. S- 1528 & 1529 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.01.2026 Mr. Altaf Hussain Solangi, Advocate for applicant Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G. Applicant is nominated as accused in two Crimes bearing Crime Nos. 38 of 2025 under Sections 353 & 324 PPC Crime No. 39 of 2025 under Section 25 Sindh Arms Act, 2013 registered at Police Station Jhalo district Dadu. An offence under Section 353 is bailable whereas an offence under Section 324 PPC while non-bailable falls within the non-prohibitory clause of Section 497 Cr.P.C. at this stage. I have gone through the facts narrated in the FIR and it shows that nobody was injured and no property was damaged and the allegation is of ineffective firing. The applicant is admitted to post-arrest bail on both crimes subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.2,50,000/- in each case and PR bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of learned trial court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
